name: Ecommerce Customer Data Platform
blurb: Unifies customer data across every storefront and channel into one profile — AI-scored, always current, ready for marketing and support to act on.

name: OCR Ingestion & Auto-Action
blurb: Scans incoming documents, extracts the data with OCR, and automatically triggers the right downstream action — no manual re-entry, no waiting.

name: IT Security Hardening
blurb: Audits, patches, and locks down your stack — least-privilege access, dependency hygiene, and monitoring that catches problems before they're incidents.

name: Microsoft Solutions
blurb: Builds and connects across the Microsoft ecosystem — Power Platform, 365, and Azure — so your existing tools finally work together.

name: IoT Device Network
blurb: Connects sensors and devices into one monitored network — real-time telemetry, alerts, and a dashboard that makes the fleet legible.
